zh.Caernarvonshire, Wales: 英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾
zh.lifeSummary: King Rhodri Ap Owain於1132年出生在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1195年在英國威爾斯安格萊享年63歲。

zh-hans.Caernarvonshire, Wales: 英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: King Rhodri Ap Owain于1132年出生在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1195年在英国威尔斯安格萊享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Owain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: O'Callaghan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam, Dermot, Donal, Kiernan, Niall, Conor, Donovan, John Patrick, Kieran, Siobhan, Tiernan.
Irish (Cork): from Gaelic Ó Ceallacháin, see Callahan .

nameMeanings.name: Rhodri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from rhod ‘wheel’ + rhi ‘ruler’; the name of a 9th-century Welsh king.

variants.name: Rhodrhi
meanings: Traditional: from rhod ‘wheel’ + rhi ‘ruler’; the name of a 9th-century Welsh king.

en.lifeSummary: King Rhodri Ap Owain was born in 1132, in Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1195, in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: King Rhodri Ap Owain est né en 1132, à Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1195, à Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: King Rhodri Ap Owain wurde 1132 in Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1195 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom.

ht.Caernarvonshire, Wales: Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom
ht.Anglesey, Wales: Anglesey, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: King Rhodri Ap Owain è nato il nel 1132 nel Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1195, nel Anglesey, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.Caernarvonshire, Wales: イギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイア
ja.Anglesey, Wales: イギリスウェールズアングレセイ
ja.lifeSummary: King Rhodri Ap Owainは1132年にイギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1195年にイギリスウェールズアングレセイで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: King Rhodri Ap Owain(은)는 1132년 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1195년 영국 웨일스 앤글레시에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Anglesey, Wales: Anglesey, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: King Rhodri Ap Owain nasceu em 1132, em Caernarfonshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1195, em Anglesey, Gales, United Kingdom, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: King Rhodri Ap Owain родился в 1132 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1195 г. в местности англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: King Rhodri Ap Owain nació en 1132, en Caernarfonshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1195, en Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años.
